steps.action: Open Org Chart and click employee name field
steps.expected: Static text becomes focused inline input with current value
steps.observed: Name field changed to `textbox "Edit name"` with existing value prefilled

steps.action: Open Hierarchy view and click employee name field
steps.expected: Row field becomes inline input with existing value
steps.observed: Field changed to `textbox "Edit name"` inline editor

assertions.title: Save on Enter key persists to backend

steps.action: Edit title inline and press Enter
steps.expected: Input closes, updated text renders, PATCH is sent
steps.observed: Title updated to `Software Engineer III` and inline log captured PATCH 200

steps.action: Edit title inline, then click another field to blur
steps.expected: Blur saves value and sends PATCH
steps.observed: Title updated to `Staff Engineer`; PATCH request captured with 200

steps.action: Type temporary title text and press Escape
steps.expected: Original value restored and no save request sent
steps.observed: Value reverted to `Staff Engineer`; inline request log remained empty

steps.action: Clear name field and press Enter
steps.expected: Validation state shown, editor remains open, no save request
steps.observed: Name editor stayed open; input class included `border-red-400` validation styling; no PATCH request captured

assertions.title: Inline edit does not trigger drag

steps.action: Focus inline inputs in Hierarchy and Org Chart and type
steps.expected: No row/card drag occurs while editing
steps.observed: Typing worked in-place with no drag interaction; Org Chart node transform stayed `translate(20px, 0px)` before/after typing

assertions.title: Inline edit reflects in all views consistently

steps.action: Edit title inline in Org Chart, then navigate to Hierarchy and Spreadsheet
steps.expected: Updated title appears consistently across all three views
steps.observed: Title updated to `Principal Engineer` in Org Chart and shown in Hierarchy and Spreadsheet

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` intermittently returned no entries during inline edit checks.
frictions.resolution: Used temporary in-page fetch/XHR logging via `agent-browser eval` to capture endpoint + status evidence for save/no-save assertions.
